newsArray.title: LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Squad, Captain, Time, Date, Venue | Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match, Ticket details
newsArray.description: Get the LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Captain, Playing XI Squad, Players List | Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match, Indian Premier League 2026 Date, Time, Venue, and Ticket details only on Indiacricketschedule.com LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 - Lucknow Super Giants Cricket team will play 68th Match of Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 against Punjab Kings Cricket Team, where the 68th Match of 74 T20s matches of IPL 2026 will be played on Saturday, May 23, 2026. The LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match will be played at Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow, and will get started at 07:30 PM LOCAL. The toss of the match will be done 30 minutes before the start of the match at 07:00 PM. The Lucknow Super Giants team will be captained by Rishabh Pant in the match and the Punjab Kings team will be captained by Shreyas Iyer. Here are the full details of the Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Timing, Captain, Squad or Players List. LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match , Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow , Sat, May 23, 2026 , Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 Lucknow Super Giants Punjab Kings Player of Match Player of Series LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Details Series Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 Match Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match Date Saturday, May 23, 2026 Time 07:30 PM Venue Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow Toss Player Of The Match LSG Impact Player Sub: ↑ Player In Name (In) for ↓ Player Out Name (Out) (Innings, Over) PBKS Impact Player Sub: ↑ Player In Name (In) for ↓ Player Out Name (Out) (Innings, Over) Umpires Third Umpire Match Referee Result LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Playing XI Captain and Squad LSG Team Playing XI for 68th Match IPL 2026 We will update the Playing XI on match day. PBKS Team Playing XI for 68th Match IPL 2026 We will update the Playing XI on match day. Ticket Prices: Entry-level tickets generally range from ₹450 to ₹1,200, while premium or hospitality seats can cost ₹20,000 or more. newsArray.title: LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Squad, Captain, Time, Date, Venue | Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match, Ticket details
newsArray.description: Get the LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Captain, Playing XI Squad, Players List | Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match, Indian Premier League 2026 Date, Time, Venue, and Ticket details only on Indiacricketschedule.com LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 - Lucknow Super Giants Cricket team will play 68th Match of Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 against Punjab Kings Cricket Team, where the 68th Match of 74 T20s matches of IPL 2026 will be played on Saturday, May 23, 2026. The LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match will be played at Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow, and will get started at 07:30 PM LOCAL. The toss of the match will be done 30 minutes before the start of the match at 07:00 PM. The Lucknow Super Giants team will be captained by Rishabh Pant in the match and the Punjab Kings team will be captained by Shreyas Iyer. Here are the full details of the Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Timing, Captain, Squad or Players List. LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match , Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow , Sat, May 23, 2026 , Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 Lucknow Super Giants Punjab Kings Player of Match Player of Series LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Details Series Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 Match Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, 68th Match Date Saturday, May 23, 2026 Time 07:30 PM Venue Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow Toss Player Of The Match LSG Impact Player Sub: ↑ Player In Name (In) for ↓ Player Out Name (Out) (Innings, Over) PBKS Impact Player Sub: ↑ Player In Name (In) for ↓ Player Out Name (Out) (Innings, Over) Umpires Third Umpire Match Referee Result LSG vs PBKS, 68th Match, IPL 2026 Playing XI Captain and Squad LSG Team Playing XI for 68th Match IPL 2026 We will update the Playing XI on match day. newsArray.title: Fakhar, Saim out of Pak-Aus ODIs
newsArray.description: The opening batters, Fakhar Zaman and Saim Ayub, will not be available for selection for the upcoming three-match One-Day International (ODI) series against the Australia national cricket team scheduled to begin on 30 May during Australia’s tour of Pakistan
